title: podman system connection list: please sort
body: The output of `podman system connection list` is random. This is causing [flakes](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4612888552800256/html/int-podman-ubuntu-2010-root-host.log.html#t--default--1). Please make it sort deterministically.
